text.title: QA Test Data Catalog Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Three test files define their own OrderFactory with slightly different defaults; flakes appear when defaults drift.
antipattern.fix: Move to catalog factory; delete locals; add lint rule.

antipattern.symptom: Test data was a prod dump with real customer names; staging exposure incident.
antipattern.fix: Switch to anonymised generator; flag all fixtures contains_pii=true; verify no real PII.

antipattern.symptom: Catalog has 230 fixtures, 80 unused; CI build slow.
antipattern.fix: Run quarterly prune; remove fixtures with zero consumers > stale threshold.
